items.title: UPQODE Invoice #126558 Due Today
items.summary: UPQODE has invoiced $2,328.75 for Milestone 1 (50% deposit) of the SEO/AEO project for TPE and EBOO services. Invoice is due June 30, 2026.
items.actionNeeded: Approve payment of $2,328.75 (or $2,242.50 if paying by ACH/wire without the 3.5% card fee).

items.title: Influex UI/UX Support Meeting Scheduled
items.summary: Influex has scheduled a meeting for Thursday, July 2 at 12:30 PM ET to discuss VYVE internal software project UI/UX support.
items.actionNeeded: Confirm attendance or delegate for the July 2 UI/UX meeting with Influex.

items.title: CRO Implementation Onboarding Thursday
items.summary: Joe McVeen (Growth Mastery AI) has scheduled a CRO implementation onboarding for Thursday, July 2 at 5:00 PM ET. He confirmed the time but noted Dr. Haas may run 15-30 minutes late.
items.actionNeeded: Confirm attendance for CRO onboarding on July 2 at 5:00 PM ET.

items.title: AI Revenue Engine Phase 1 Kickoff
items.summary: Joe McVeen confirmed Dr. Haas approved Phase 1 of the AI Revenue Engine ($9,500, or $9,780 with card fee). Invoice sent; kickoff session options requested for Thursday July 2.
items.actionNeeded: Review invoice and confirm if kickoff will be Thursday July 2 at 4 PM ET (or Friday at 9 AM).

items.title: VYVE Homepage Messaging Meeting Scheduled
items.summary: Influex has updated and scheduled a messaging & design session for the VYVE homepage on Monday, July 6 at 4:00 PM ET.
items.actionNeeded: Confirm attendance for the July 6 homepage messaging meeting with Influex.

items.title: Vibe Science Podcast Invitation
items.summary: Dr. Haas has been invited to appear on The Vibe Science Podcast. They record Tuesdays at 12 PM or 2 PM EST, and Wednesdays 11 AM–1 PM EST; need availability ASAP.
items.actionNeeded: Provide a few available time slots within Tuesday/Wednesday windows for podcast recording.

items.title: Gate MyQ Device Quote Received
items.summary: Stefan Casale (Catawba Fence) provided a quote for installing a Liftmaster MyQ device on the property gate at 3637 Pelham Ln, Charlotte after Yanina answered his questions.
items.actionNeeded: Review quote and approve if acceptable; Yanina is managing.
